The '''''V'sett''-class fighter''' was a heavy [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] in the late [[New Jedi Order era]].

==Characteristics==
Unlike the [[Swarm-class battle droid|''Swarm''-class battle droid]], the ''V'sett''-class [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by a living [[Ssi-ruu]] who resided beneath an opaque hull that resembled a flattened and curved standard Battle Droid.

The ''V'sett''-class fighters were equipped with shield generators and sensor arrays at every corner, two technologies provided by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as enticement for the Ssi-ruuk to provide him with their entechment technology thirty years earlier. Their engines flashed bright violet when powering at maximum and their laser blasts burned a brilliant white.

In addition to lasers, the ''V'sett'' also possessed a small tractor beam emitter.

==History==
Due to the [[Ssi-ruu]]k's [[Ssi-ruuvi religion|religious fear]] of dying on an unconsecrated [[Planet/Legends|world]], the ''V'sett''-class fighters were largely concentrated in the safe confines of the [[Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster]] and thus were not deployed outside of Ssi-ruuvi space. [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] and [[Empire of the Hand]] starfighter pilots fought these starfighters during their incursions into Ssi-ruuvi space following the events of the [[Invasion of Bakura|failed Ssi-ruuvi invasion]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. However, they were first observed by [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces only in the second [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|Ssi-ruuvi invasion of Bakura]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
